name: Blue Dragon Ninja
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>青</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にんじゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn, during either player's turn: You can discard 1 "Ninja" monster and 1 "Ninjitsu Art" card to target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; this turn, that monster's effects are negated, also that monster cannot attack.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, during either player's turn: You can discard 1 "Ninja" monster and 1 "Ninjitsu Art" card to target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; this turn, that monster's effects are negated, also that monster cannot attack.
eff: Once per turn, during either player's turn: You can discard 1 "Ninja" monster and 1 "Ninjitsu Art" card to target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; this turn, that monster's effects are negated, also that monster cannot attack.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
attack: Prevents your opponent's monsters from attacking
